agents.title: Single Agent
agents.description: Google ADK agent backed by your LiteLLM-compatible endpoint.

agents.title: Multi Agent
agents.description: Runs two simple agents on the same topic: one writes 2 paragraphs and the other returns 3 bullet points.
agents.prompt_hint: Send a topic like: Artificial intelligence in education

agents.title: Orchestrator Agent
agents.description: Routes to one of 3 specialist agents using an explicit agent_type in the prompt: explain, bullet, or quiz.
agents.prompt_hint:
agent_type: explain
request: Explain what an agent orchestrator does.

agents.title: Streaming Agent
agents.description: Module 04: same LiteLLM model as the single agent, but the React chat UI consumes token-by-token chunks from Runner.run_async() via NDJSON streaming.
agents.prompt_hint: Ask any question — the answer appears incrementally in the chat UI.

agents.title: Weather Assistant (tools)
agents.description: Module 05: LLM agent with tools — Meteosource current weather by place_id and Celsius/Fahrenheit conversion; non-weather questions get a short refusal.
agents.prompt_hint: Weather only, e.g.: What is the weather in calgary?  (Set WEATHER_API_KEY in .env.)

agents.title: Custom Agent (keyword router)
agents.description: Module 06: BaseAgent subclass — keyword routing to a tech or general LlmAgent (no LLM for routing); same Runner + streaming pattern as Module 04.
agents.prompt_hint: Try tech: Explain Python decorators.  Or general: What is a good book about habits?

agents.title: Business Banking (multi-agent)
agents.description: Module 07: SequentialAgent pipeline — deposit_agent analyzes cash flow, bill_agent reviews obligations, decision_agent recommends overdraft approval. Uses mock banking data.
agents.prompt_hint: Enter a customer ID: CUST-1001 (healthy) or CUST-2002 (weaker profile).

agents.title: MCP Client (Redis banking)
agents.description: Module 10: single LlmAgent using McpToolset (Redis MCP server) to persist and retrieve business banking memory per customer.
agents.prompt_hint: Try: CUST-1001 — summarize profile and store summary + next action in Redis memory.

suggestions.label: CUST-1001 — save banking summary
suggestions.prompt: CUST-1001: summarize profile and save to Redis memory.

suggestions.label: CUST-2002 — risk coaching plan
suggestions.prompt: CUST-2002: retrieve memory (if any), then save a coaching next action.

agents.title: MCP Server (OpenAPI explorer)
agents.description: Module 11: OpenAPI-backed MCP server that indexes operations by operationId, returns resolved schemas, and generates mock request/response payloads.
agents.prompt_hint: Try: Find the customer profile operation, show its schema, then generate a mock request and response.

suggestions.label: Find customer profile API
suggestions.prompt: Search for the customer profile operation and summarize method, path, and operationId.

suggestions.label: Mock overdraft review payloads
suggestions.prompt: Find the overdraft review operation and generate a mock request and response.

agents.title: Retail Deposit API Agent (sequential)
agents.description: Module 26: Sequential retail deposit workflow with intake, risk, and decision stages that returns strict JSON output for API consumption.
agents.prompt_hint: Send a customer ID like RET-3101 or RET-4420. The final response is JSON.
